name: Express Safe Twin
description: Express API that looks similar to the vulnerable seed but uses custom auth middleware, ownership checks, parameterized queries, and a lockfile.

negative_controls.description: Admin export route uses custom auth and role middleware and should stay clean.
User lookup uses parameterized SQL plus ownership checks and should stay clean.
Search route uses user input safely through a parameterized query.
App bootstrap applies custom response hardening and error handling.
